summary: Iteration 7: Multi-pack checkout with exact pack price summation. All backend tests PASSED (10/10). All frontend tests PASSED. The new /api/orders/create-multi endpoint correctly sums pack prices (NOT volume pricing). Cart 37€ = Checkout 37€ = OxaPay 37€.
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/orders/create-multi correctly sums exact pack prices (5+12+20=37€, NOT volume pricing)
OxaPay payload includes feePaidByPayer:0 and lifeTime:60
Frontend correctly routes: single pack (count=1) → /checkout/{pack_id}, multi-pack or count>1 → /checkout/multi
Checkout page displays 3-line breakdown with correct prices per pack
test_credentials: Email: test@deezlink.com, OxaPay merchant key: EWVVRZ-Y40MQP-ZZBKWM-GRJ8UT
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-pack checkout is fully functional. /api/orders/create-multi sums exact pack prices. Frontend routes correctly based on cart contents. Cart quantity buttons (+/-) work correctly.

verified_flows.details: Returns price=37.0 (5+12+20), quantity=9 (1+3+5), items breakdown with 3 lines, valid OxaPay payment_url
Returns 400 Bad Request with 'Unknown pack id'
Returns 400 Bad Request with 'exceeds allowed limit'
Returns 4 packs with correct prices: single=5€, pack_3=12€, pack_5=20€, pack_10=35€

verified_flows.flow: Frontend: Add 3 packs to cart → Cart shows 37€
verified_flows.details: Cart panel shows 3 items (5€, 12€, 20€) with Total=37€
Total displayed is exactly 37.00 EUR (not volume pricing)
Adding Starter pack twice (count=2) and checkout → /checkout/multi
+ button increases quantity, - button decreases quantity, total updates correctly

oxapay_payload_verified.effect: Merchant absorbs OxaPay fees - customer pays exact amount shown on checkout
